mapper.select: SELECT id, type, title, summary, content, cover_url, link_url, author, source_org, is_top, status, sort_order, publish_time, create_time, update_time, creator_id FROM cms_content WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE cms_content
title = #{title},
summary = #{summary},
content = #{content},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
link_url = #{linkUrl},
author = #{author},
source_org = #{sourceOrg},
is_top = #{isTop},
status = #{status},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
